instance.label: Nome Da Instância
instance.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = TableListaInstancias.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( currentRow.instance.instanceName)) :  currentRow.instance.instanceName })()}}

customColumn1.label: Status
customColumn1.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = TableListaInstancias.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( currentRow.instance.status === "open" ? "Conectado" : currentRow.instance.status === "close" ? "Desconectado" : "Aguardando Conexão")) :  currentRow.instance.status === "open" ? "Conectado" : currentRow.instance.status === "close" ? "Desconectado" : "Aguardando Conexão" })()}}

customColumn2.label: ApiKey
customColumn2.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = TableListaInstancias.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( currentRow.instance.apikey)) :  currentRow.instance.apikey })()}}
